context: A dancer practices ballet technique at home while using the mirror to refine posture and alignment.

actions.description: Dancer lowers into a controlled plie, reflected clearly in the full length mirror.
Dancer extends through tendu with pointed foot and measured arm placement across the warm floor.
Dancer lifts into a brief arabesque and holds balance while checking alignment in the mirror.
